decks.notes: This deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan by utilizing removal spells, hand disruption, and land destruction while also maintaining a strong board presence with flying creatures like Exalted Angel. The deck also has access to powerful finishers like Decree of Justice and Eternal Dragon to close out the game. By controlling the game through a combination of removal, disruption, and threats, this deck can grind out victories against a variety of opponents in a premodern 1 vs 1 setting.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and land denial. By efficiently managing the opponent's resources and disrupting their game plan, the deck aims to stall the game until it can establish a dominant board presence or win condition. The inclusion of cards like Standstill and Parallax Tide helps to further slow down the opponent's progress, while cards like Wrath of God and Decree of Justice serve as board wipes to reset the battlefield when needed. Overall, the deck revolves around controlling the game tempo and outlasting the opponent.

This deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures using cards like Hermit Druid and Worldly Tutor, then utilize cards like Reanimate and Shallow Grave to bring back big threats like Phyrexian Dreadnought and Sutured Ghoul for a powerful combo finish. The deck also includes disruption in the form of cards like Stifle and Duress to disrupt opponents' game plans and protect your combo. The key strategy is to efficiently assemble your combo pieces and disrupt your opponent's plans to secure a quick victory.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana using enchantments like Wild Growth and Fertile Ground, while also drawing cards with Enchantress's Presence and Sylvan Library. The key strategy is to assemble a combination of cards like Opalescence and Replenish to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of enchantment creatures. City of Brass and Serra's Sanctum provide additional mana sources, allowing for explosive plays. The deck also includes disruption elements like Aura of Silence and Parallax Wave to control the board and protect the combo. Mobilezation provides a finisher by creating an army of tokens.

The key strategy of this deck is to utilize Ill-Gotten Gains along with various fast mana acceleration cards such as Lion's Eye Diamond and Lotus Petal to generate a large amount of mana quickly. By casting spells like Cabal Ritual and Dark Ritual, the deck aims to set up a game-winning combo involving Brain Freeze to mill the opponent's library. The deck includes cards like Cunning Wish and Intuition to search for key pieces of the combo, while also including disruptive spells like Orim's Chant to protect its game plan.

The deck focuses on disrupting opponents with counterspells and hand disruption while using Psychatog as a win condition. It includes card draw spells to maintain card advantage and control the game. Additionally, there are removal spells like Smother to deal with opposing threats. The mana base is structured to consistently cast spells and support the deck's strategy. The goal is to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through careful resource management and efficient threat assessment. Ultimately, the deck aims to control the game until Psychatog can close out the match.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with aggressive creatures like Nimble Mongoose and Anurid Brushhopper, while disrupting the opponent's mana base with cards like Wasteland and Armageddon. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with early threats and disrupt their game plan by using land destruction effects. Cards like Swords to Plowshares and Sylvan Library provide additional utility and card advantage to maintain pressure. The deck aims to quickly deplete the opponent's resources and capitalize on its aggressive creatures to secure victory.

The deck revolves around assembling the combo of Phyrexian Devourer and Fling to achieve a one-shot kill on the opponent. By using Tinker to tutor for key pieces and Altar of Dementia to fuel the combo, the deck aims to win quickly and efficiently. Defense Grid and Tsabo's Web provide disruption to protect the combo, while Oath of Druids helps find the key pieces. The mana base is built to support the combo with fast mana sources and lands that can produce a variety of colors.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly generate card advantage by playing enchantments to draw cards and ramp mana. The key strategy revolves around using cards like Argothian Enchantress, Enchantress's Presence, and Mirri's Guile to draw cards and find combo pieces, while also utilizing cards like Sterling Grove to protect key enchantments. The deck aims to set up a powerful board presence by using cards like Opalescence, Parallax Wave, and Seal of Cleansing, and ultimately win the game with efficient combos like Replenish.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive swarm of goblin creatures. The deck focuses on using cheap, efficient goblins to quickly build a threatening board presence and deal damage quickly. The deck includes various goblin creatures with abilities that synergize well together, allowing for powerful combos and strategies. Additionally, the deck includes some disruptive cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to control the opponent's mana sources and slow down their game plan. With a mix of efficient creatures and disruption, this deck aims to close out games quickly before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with aggressive creatures and disrupting their hand with hand disruption spells. With a combination of efficient removal spells and powerful creatures, the deck aims to control the board and drain the opponent's resources. By utilizing cards like Ravenous Rats and Hypnotic Specter to pressure the opponent's hand, while also deploying threats like Nantuko Shade and Mishra's Factory to close out the game, the deck aims to maintain tempo and win the game through attrition.

The deck focuses on utilizing control elements such as Winter Orb, Opposition, and Tradewind Rider to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining card advantage with Survival of the Fittest and various creature synergies. The deck also includes a toolbox of creatures like Mystic Snake, Nantuko Vigilante, and Uktabi Orangutan to handle various threats. The mana base is optimized with Gaea's Cradle and a mix of lands and mana dorks to enable the deployment of powerful creatures and spells. Ultimately, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with enchantments using cards like Attunement and Frantic Search, before casting Replenish to bring them all back onto the battlefield. By utilizing Opalescence and Parallax Wave/Tide, the deck can turn its enchantments into creatures and control the opponent's board while setting up for a lethal attack. Stifle is included to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing provide removal options. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful combo finish.

This deck focuses on quickly assembling the combo of Replenish, Opalescence, Parallax Tide, and Parallax Wave to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence. It utilizes cards like Frantic Search, Intuition, and Attunement to find pieces of the combo, while also running disruption like Stifle and Swords to Plowshares to control the game. The deck aims to use its powerful enchantments to lock down the opponent's board and eventually win the game through sheer advantage and pressure. It seeks to win the game as quickly and efficiently as possible.

The primary focus of this deck is to utilize the combo of Replenish, Opalescence, and Parallax cards to control the board and overwhelm the opponent. With the ability to repeatedly exile and return enchantments, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's resources while building a powerful board presence. The inclusion of cards like Frantic Search and Intuition allows for card advantage and consistency in finding key pieces of the combo. By efficiently managing resources and timing plays, this deck can quickly establish dominance and secure the win.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent, utilizing efficient and direct burn spells like Lightning Bolt, Incinerate, and Fireblast. Creatures like Ball Lightning, Grim Lavamancer, and Mogg Fanatic aid in this strategy by providing consistent damage output. The inclusion of cards like Cursed Scroll, Seal of Fire, and Sulfuric Vortex further amplifies the deck's ability to chip away at the opponent's life total. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, relentless aggression to secure a quick victory.
